name: Sesame Pumpkin-Seed Brittle
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Hulled green pumpkin seeds, Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a dry heavy skillet, cook the sugar over moderate heat until it begins to melt.
2. Continue cooking, stirring with a fork, until the sugar is completely melted and golden caramel in color.
3. Remove the skillet from the heat.
4. Stir in the pumpkin seeds and sesame seeds.
5. Quickly pour the mixture onto a sheet of foil.
6. Let the brittle cool and break into small pieces.
7. The brittle may be made up to 1 week in advance and kept in an airtight container.
